zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Châtillon de Blois Vicomte de Limoges, Seigneur d'Avesnes於1400年出生在法國布格尼艾福可斯-庫斯-素-洛易多時，他的父親Jean de Blois-Châtillon I55歲，母親Marguerite de Clisson38歲。他於1450年與Elizabeth Isabelle de la Tour d'Auvergne結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1454年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: de

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille.
French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Châtillon de Blois Vicomte de Limoges, Seigneur d'Avesnes was born in 1400, in Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, his father, Jean de Blois-Châtillon I, was 55 and his mother, Marguerite de Clisson, was 38. He married Elizabeth Isabelle de la Tour d'Auvergne in 1450. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1454, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Châtillon de Blois Vicomte de Limoges, Seigneur d'Avesnes est né en 1400, à Donzy, Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Jean de Blois-Châtillon I, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Clisson, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Isabelle de la Tour d'Auvergne en 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1454, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

Er hat 1450 Elizabeth Isabelle de la Tour d'Auvergne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1454 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Châtillon de Blois Vicomte de Limoges, Seigneur d'Avesnes(이)가 1400년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 코스니-쿠르스-수-로이르 돈즈이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Blois-Châtillon I(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Clisson(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1450년 Elizabeth Isabelle de la Tour d'Auvergne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Châtillon de Blois Vicomte de Limoges, Seigneur d'Avesnes родился в 1400 г. в местности донзи, косне-коурс-сур-лоир, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Blois-Châtillon I было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Clisson, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Isabelle de la Tour d'Auvergne в 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1454 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
